title: Persistent Volumes — Raw Block Volume Support
text:
The following volume plugins support raw block volumes, including dynamic provisioning where
applicable:
CSI (including some CSI migrated volume types)
FC (Fibre Channel)
iSCSI
Local volume

apiVersion
:
v1
kind
:
PersistentVolume
metadata
:

:
block-pv

:

:
storage
:
10Gi
accessModes
:
-
ReadWriteOnce
volumeMode
:
Block
persistentVolumeReclaimPolicy
:
Retain
fc
:
targetWWNs
:
[
"50060e801049cfd1"
]
lun

0
readOnly
